venupasala2004@gmail.com | +91-8073487489 | LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/venupasala/  | Bengaluru, India 
 
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY  
I am a motivated and detail-oriented B.Tech student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, seeking an 
internship in Software Development or Machine Learning. I aim to apply my experience in building scalable web applications

experience in building scalable web applications and intelligent systems to solve real-world problems. With a strong foundation in coding, data analysis, and model 
development, I am eager to contribute to impactful projects while learning and growing in a collaborative tech environment. 
 
TECHNICAL SKILLS 
 Languages & Databases: Python, Java, C, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL, MySQL, MongoDB. 
 Frameworks & Libraries: TensorFlow, Pandas, NumPy, OpenCV.

s & Libraries: TensorFlow, Pandas, NumPy, OpenCV.  Tools & Platforms: Jupyter Notebook, VS Code, Git, Git-hub, Docker, Postman, AWS, Hugging Face. 
 AI/ML Skills: Data Preprocessing, ML Algorithms, Model Deployment, CNNs, RNNs, NLP, Model Evaluation. 
 Soft Skills: DSA, Problem Solving, Communication, Adaptability, Agile Development, Collaborative Development. 
 
WORK EXPERIENCE 
AI Engineer Intern — Wizzybox Pvt. Ltd (Jan 2026  - Present) 
Under Training of Namma QA Community, Bengaluru

Under Training of Namma QA Community, Bengaluru  Trained in software testing fundamentals including SDLC, STLC, and smoke, sanity, and regression testing. 
 Applied Python basics (lists, tuples, dictionaries, exception handling) for logic building and testing support. 
 Used SQL basic queries for data validation and understanding backend data flow. 
 
Software Development Engineer Intern — Bluestock (May – Jun 2025) 
 Developed and deployed a scalable IPO web application with efficient state management and form validation.

h efficient state management and form validation.  Designed and integrated RESTful APIs for IPO data handling and key management to improve backend performance. 
 Optimized performance using caching and code efficiency improvements, achieving a 25% faster page load time. 
 
PROJECTS 
Email Aggregator – AI-Powered Onebox System | Node.js, TypeScript, IMAP, Elasticsearch, Weaviate, Groq LLM (RAG).  
 Developed a real-time IMAP email aggregation system with high-performance search powered by Elasticsearch.

high-performance search powered by Elasticsearch.  Implemented AI-based email intent classification with automated Slack notifications and webhook integrations. 
 Integrated RAG-driven suggested replies using a vector database and Groq LLM for context-aware responses. 
AI-Powered Classroom Attendance System | Python, OpenCV, Flask, Face Recognition 
 Built an AI-based smart attendance system using Python, Flask, OpenCV, and InsightFace for real-time face recognition 
and tracking.

ace for real-time face recognition 
and tracking.  Implemented blur detection with auto-zoom, multi-role dashboards, and session-based attendance logic. 
 Designed scalable data storage and exportable reporting with future database integration support. 
SST Digital Hub | React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Firebase Cloud & Authentication 
 Developed and deployed a commercial website for SST Group showcasing digital solutions for weighbridge 
systems and agricultural equipment, enhancing customer engagement and product visibility.

ncing customer engagement and product visibility.  Integrated responsive UI/UX design and optimized performance for cross-device compatibility, resulting in 
improved user experience and faster loading speeds. 
 
CERTIFICATIONS 
 AWS Academy Cloud Foundations— AWS Academy Graduate (2024) 
 Deep Learning Using TensorFlow — IBM (2025) 
 Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2025 Certified AI Foundations Associate — Oracle(2025)

Srinivas University Institute of Engineering & Technology, Mangalore (2022–2026)

f Engineering & Technology, Mangalore (2022–2026) Bachelor of Technology (AI & ML) | CGPA: 9.03 | Expected Graduation: 2026 
                               
DECLARATION 
I hereby declare that the above information is true and correct to the best of my knowledge and belief.
